title: Yijing Hexagram 60: Jie (Limitation)
description: Hexagram 60 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 60 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Limitation. Success. Galling limitation must not be persevered in. Water over lake: the image of Limitation.
